name: OSX-Proxmox-Next
description: Automated macOS VM creation for Proxmox VE with TUI wizard. Supports Ventura 13, Sonoma 14, Sequoia 15, and Tahoe 26. Features auto-detection of CPU vendor (Intel/AMD), OpenCore bootloader setup, and SMBIOS generation for Apple services.

notes.text: In order to run this tool, you need to run the following command: echo 'options kvm ignore_msrs=Y' >> /etc/modprobe.d/kvm.conf && update-initramfs -k all -u
Requires Proxmox VE 9.x for full compatibility (8.x supported with warning)
Intel and AMD CPUs are supported (auto-detected)
Apple ID sign-in works best on Sonoma 14 or earlier (Sequoia/Tahoe have hardware attestation requirements)
This tool creates VMs - it does not run as a service
